title: MODERATE: Sidebar setOpen has Strict Mode double-cookie-write risk
description: M4: src/components/ui/sidebar.tsx:72 — `document.cookie` is written synchronously inside the `setOpen` callback. React 18 Strict Mode double-invokes callbacks on initial mount, potentially writing the cookie twice.
resolution: Moved document.cookie write to useEffect to avoid React 18 Strict Mode double-invocation
